slice: Decision D — baseline source-conformance doctrine doc
lane: operator-directed (Decision D resolution); doc-only, no code
doctrine: A backend integration may supply observations; only a conforming witness may supply testimony. Exporters provide visibility; witnesses declare standing. 'We can scrape it' != 'it can testify'.
built: docs/working/decisions/BASELINE_SOURCE_CONFORMANCE.md (candidate/non-authorizing): conformance tiers (Tier 1 conforming witness / Tier 2 observation source / Tier 3 generic metrics / Prom-projection-of-witness), promotion rule, native-adapter forcing-case rule, shared-source contamination warning, and a per-exporter matrix (node/postgres/redis/mysql/nginx/blackbox/cadvisor/process/telegraf) with what each cannot carry + promotion path.
Pointer added from docs/operator/integrations.md to the new doc (integrations.md stays setup-oriented).
BASELINE_SERVICE_ROLLOUT: Decision D resolved + Sources lane points to the conformance doc; kea_dhcp added to the Tier-1 exemplar list.
grounding: Tier language verified vs nq-witness/SPEC.md (observation vs conforming witness) + RELATIONSHIP_TO_PROMETHEUS.md (visibility vs condition; shared-source contamination != corroboration). Exporter list + ports taken from the existing integrations.md.
resolves: Decision D (new doctrine doc + integrations.md pointer; integrations.md stays setup). Split out an operator-facing BASELINE_PROM_EXPORTERS.md only when curation outgrows a screen.
scope_guard: Doc-only. Non-authorizing — records what a source may be relied on for; authorizes no wrapper/adapter/claim. No code touched.
verify: gap-status gate green (no gaps touched); decisions/ docs not CI-gated.
acceptance: Decision D resolved. ALL FOUR rollout decisions (A dns / B kea / C time_basis / D prom-conformance) now closed. Loop AUDIT/idle. PUSH: held (workweek). The baseline-rollout ontology is fully front-loaded.
